story.iWant: to select supporting content types and visual treatment options for each section, with optional research
story.soThat: each part of my presentation has rich context for slide generation

subtasks.subtask: Present 4 content type options: Statistics/data points, Customer quotes/testimonials, Case study examples, Industry benchmarks
Present diagram type options via AskUserQuestion (multiSelect: true): Flowchart, Comparison, Timeline, Hierarchy
Present visual metaphor options: Journey, Building, Growth, Transformation
Present imagery theme options: Technology, People, Nature, Abstract
Ask user if they want research for this section
If yes, use WebSearch tool to find statistics, quotes, examples
Display summary of all section discovery selections
Ask if user wants to refine any selections
Proceed to next section after confirmation
Verify section.discovery object contains: key_message, content_types, visual_treatment, research_findings
Confirm data available for Story 13.4 schema integration

criterion.title: Content Type Selection
criterion.given: I have selected a key message for a section
criterion.then: I can select content types via multi-select from: Statistics/data points, Customer quotes/testimonials, Case study examples, Industry benchmarks

criterion.title: Visual Treatment Selection
criterion.then: I can select via multi-select from: Diagram type (flowchart, comparison, timeline, hierarchy), Visual metaphor (journey, building, growth, transformation), Imagery theme (technology, people, nature, abstract)

criterion.title: On-Demand Research
criterion.given: I am asked if I want research for the section
criterion.then: WebSearch tool finds supporting data (statistics, quotes, examples)

criterion.title: Research Results Selection
criterion.then: I can select which findings to include via multi-select AskUserQuestion

criterion.title: Section Refinement
criterion.given: content and visual selections are complete
criterion.then: I can adjust my selections or provide additional notes before advancing to the next section

criterion.title: Discovery Storage
criterion.given: all selections are made for a section
criterion.then: all data is stored in section.discovery object: content_types, visual_treatment, research_findings

doc.title: Enhanced Planning Sessions - Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Defines the content type selection (multiSelect: true for Statistics, Testimonials, Case Study, Benchmarks), visual treatment selection (diagram types, visual metaphors, imagery themes), and on-demand research integration pattern via WebSearch tool.

doc.title: Enhanced Planning Sessions - Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Shows JSON structure for AskUserQuestion tool with multiSelect: true, 4-option limit per question, and required fields (question, header, options with label/description).

doc.title: Epic 13: Enhanced Planning Sessions
doc.snippet: Content type selection (stats, quotes, examples, benchmarks), visual treatment options (diagram types, metaphors, themes), on-demand research via WebSearch, section refinement before advancing.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: Defines the discovery object structure under each slide/section with key_message, content_types array, visual_treatment object (diagram_type, visual_metaphor, imagery_theme), and research_findings array.

doc.title: Story 13.2: Section Message Discovery
doc.snippet: Establishes Step 2.6 iteration pattern with for-each over agenda_sections, discovery object initialization, AskUserQuestion single-select for messages, and workflow continuation within same step.

artifact.reason: Primary modification target. Contains the for-each loop over agenda_sections where content/visual discovery will be added after message selection.
Shows existing pattern for initializing section.discovery object - content_types and visual_treatment will be added to this same object.
Reference for AskUserQuestion tool call structure with questions array, header, options, and multiSelect parameter.
Pattern for handling user selection from AskUserQuestion and "Other" custom input, storing in discovery object.
Workflow configuration for plan-deck; may need variable additions for discovery state tracking.

node.purpose: Headless browser for screenshots (not directly used in this story)
Google Slides export (not directly used in this story)

claudeCode.purpose: Primary tool for multi-select content type and visual treatment selection
On-demand research to find supporting statistics, quotes, examples

constraints.constraint: AskUserQuestion has a 4-option limit per question - must split visual treatment into multiple questions (diagram types, then metaphors/themes)
Use multiSelect: true for all selections in this story (different from Story 13.2 which used false for single-select messages)
Continue within existing Step 2.6 for-each loop - do NOT create a new step
Store all selections in section.discovery object to maintain data structure for Story 13.4
Handle "Other" custom input for all AskUserQuestion prompts
Depends on Story 13.2 completion - section.discovery.key_message must already be populated
Research is optional - only invoke WebSearch if user explicitly requests it
Provide refinement opportunity before advancing to next section in the loop

interface.name: section.discovery Object
interface.signature: { key_message: string, // from Story 13.2 content_types: string[], // NEW in 13.3 visual_treatment: { // NEW in 13.3 diagram_type: string[], visual_metaphor: string[], imagery_theme: string[] }, research_findings: [{ // NEW in 13.3 (optional) source: string, content: string, selected: boolean }] }

tests.standards: No automated testing framework in place. Testing is manual via workflow execution. Run /sb:plan-deck in Claude Code CLI and observe multi-select prompts, verify selections are stored in discovery object, and confirm research integration works when requested.

locations.location: Inspect generated plan.yaml in output/{deck-slug}/ for discovery data

ideas.idea: Test content type multi-select appears after message selection with 4 options
Test visual treatment multi-select with diagram types, verify multiple questions if needed due to 4-option limit
Test "yes" response to research offer triggers WebSearch
Test research findings presented as multi-select options
Test refinement prompt appears and allows adjustment before proceeding
Test section.discovery contains all new fields after section completes
Test full flow through multiple sections - each should get full discovery
Test "Other" custom input handling for visual treatment options
Test declining research (user says "no") skips WebSearch and proceeds
